Name: MI Security
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's Critical Rate <@ba.vup>+5.0%</>. 
After the wearer scores a critical hit, the wearer gains ATK <@ba.vup>+5.0%</> for 5s. This effect can reach 5 stacks. At max stacks, grant an additional Critical Rate <@ba.vup>+5.0%</>. This effect cannot stack.
